items.title: What’s It Like to Be Killed by Nature’s Most Brutal Predator
items.author: Kurzgesagt – In a Nutshell
items.content:
<article>🌏 Upgrade your online protection with an all-in-one security app! Get an exclusive NordVPN deal + 4 months extra here: https://NordVPN.com/Kurzgesagt
Itʼs risk free with NordVPNʼs 30-day money-back guarantee!

Visit https://www.youtube.com/@nightshift_kurzgesagt and explore the weird, beautiful, and sometimes unsettling side of history.

Sources & further reading:
https://sites.google.com/view/sources-superpredators/

There is a hidden world filled with monsters you never heard of, from predators who spit acid and shoot harpoons, to armored hunters that devour their prey alive. Deep in the oceans, and even in fresh water from puddles and lakes, these microscopic super predators remained hidden in plain sight, and evolved over the last 2 billion years.

What are the deadliest predators of the microworld, and what kind of bizarre biological weapons have they evolved over the past billions of years?

items.title: The True Cost of War
items.author: Kurzgesagt – In a Nutshell
items.content:
<article>War costs far more than weapons and destroyed buildings. It leaves countries poorer, disrupts education, drives migration, and passes trauma to future generations. Some of its highest costs are paid decades later.

#kurzgesagt
#inanutshell #kurzgesagt_inanutshell #learnwithshorts #science 
#warfare #generationalcurse #warcosts

items.title: The World’s Most Average Person
items.author: Kurzgesagt – In a Nutshell
items.content:
